title: Warrant Chamber

fields.vision: Warrant Chamber is a manuscript-centered evidence governance room handoff, also called The House of Evidence.
fields.mechanism: It specifies a room for preserving the relation between text, claim, source, counter-source, warrant strength, dissent, judgment, repair, revision state, and certification, with data model, workflow, screen blueprint, role-permission, event-taxonomy, design-token, SQL, GraphQL, and SVG architecture artifacts.
fields.source_utilization: Intelligence tradecraft, counterintelligence, and analytic method. Use source library intelligence titles as method authority and intelligence-domain stressors. Vision: Present intelligence pages as disciplined analytic-method and tradecraft demonstrations. Mechanism: Tie claims to collection, covert action, deception, interrogation, bias-control, and analytic-logic mechanisms. Plan: Prioritize Capstone, SATS, CI, RAG integrity, and analyst-assurance pages for close-reading. Status: source library identified as candidate scholarly support; direct quotation requires exact passage review. Remaining gap: Need method-passage extraction and claim-to-source linkage. Source pool: 60 deduplicated local title candidates; 63 catalogue support rows. Examples: Improving Intelligence Analysis; Leading Intelligence Analysis. source library scholarly-source routing with author correction. Raw filenames often append Nik_Murano and are not treated as authorship evidence. Catalogue rows are preferred for authors where available. This strengthens page vision, mechanism, source-use, plan, and gap language, but it does not certify passage-level citation support. source-library controlled content is source evidence for internal scholarship and planning; do not redistribute source files or long excerpts in the public package.
fields.plan: How this briefing says the vision should be accomplished, translated into a public project route. When to reach for this: when building or specifying a scholarly/publication-grade evidence-governance environment; when a doctoral committee, editorial board, policy board, or research lab needs version-bound certification; when you need a concrete, typed object model for manuscript-claim-source-dissent-verdict flow. Entry point: README.md — docs/01_Master_Spec.md — docs/02_Screen_Blueprint.md — docs/03_Data_Model_and_Information_Architecture.md — docs/04_Workflows_and_States.md — docs/13_Schema.sql + docs/14_GraphQL_Types.graphql. Integration target: any system that must produce version-bound certification packets; any tool that ingests NSRP protocol work products; any downstream publication / dissemination room. Wire or preserve the implementation files: docs/13_Schema.sql — complete Postgres DDL (23 tables) - docs/14_GraphQL_Types.graphql — API type definitions - docs/11_Design_Tokens.json — design token catalog - docs/12_Event_Taxonomy.json — event schema for audit log - docs/08_Component_Inventory.csv, docs/09_Frame_Map.csv, docs/10_Role_Permission_Matrix.csv - 6 editable SVG diagrams (room architecture, claim halo, state machine, data model, desktop layout, tribunal layout)
fields.remaining_gaps: Retain the packet as a completed authority layer, then decide whether it should remain a reference file or become a live room, method page, or public proof object.
fields.detailed_source_vision: Primary room name: The Warrant Chamber. Poetic alias: The House of Evidence. This handoff delivers a full design-and-build package for what is explicitly not a citation manager, note-taking surface, or generic research workspace. It is a manuscript-centered evidentiary governance environment whose purpose is to preserve, display, and operationalize the full relation between text, claim, source, counter-source, judgment, repair, dissent, and certification — without flattening any of those layers into a bibliography, a comment thread, or a final score. The room is built for scholarship and strategic writing at a level where the user must be able to answer, for any non-trivial claim: what authorizes this statement, at what strength, with what limits, against what rivals, under whose judgment, and in which exact version of the text. Design target: elite doctoral, editorial-board, policy-board, or research-lab workflow. The room must feel consequential...
fields.detailed_source_mechanism: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.

maintenance_rule: Update this blueprint before strengthening public claims on the website. Do not use word count, module count, or status percentage as a substitute for concrete project substance.
claim_ceiling_rule: Public claims may rise only when the built components, source use, status, and remaining gaps are updated here and reflected in the rendered page.

public_standard_check.Vision: This document supports the public account of Blueprint by preserving the project purpose, reader-facing claim, and professional-portfolio role.
public_standard_check.Mechanism: It connects source material, project components, implementation state, and next actions so the work can be inspected rather than merely asserted.
public_standard_check.What is built: The supporting evidence is the named page, blueprint, packet, project file, source record, or implementation page described in the document.
public_standard_check.Source use: Sources are used as method and source background, domain grounding, or project history; direct quotation and stronger factual claims require passage-level review.
public_standard_check.Plan: Bind claims to exact source anchors, visible implementation evidence, or a narrower public claim.
public_standard_check.Status: Current support record for the professional package unless explicitly marked archival.
public_standard_check.Remaining Gaps: Passage-level source check, implementation verification, citation cleanup, and proportional public wording remain open where evidence is incomplete.

public_pitch.what_it_is: Warrant Chamber is a manuscript-centered evidence governance room handoff, also called The House of Evidence.
public_pitch.distinctive_mechanism: It specifies a room for preserving the relation between text, claim, source, counter-source, warrant strength, dissent, judgment, repair, revision state, and certification, with data model, workflow, screen blueprint, role-permission, event-taxonomy, design-token, SQL, GraphQL, and SVG architecture artifacts.
public_pitch.why_it_matters: It matters because serious writing needs more than citations: a reviewer must be able to see what authorizes a claim, what contests it, how strong the warrant is, what version carries the judgment, and what build path would turn the handoff into a live evidentiary room.
public_pitch.pitch_integrity_note: Mechanism-first public pitch inserted after the Nexus Lab mechanism-erasure audit on 2026-05-13; source basis: rendered correction table.

pitch_integrity_audit.standard: object, distinctive mechanism, value, built state, and non-overclaim discipline must be visible.
